title: The Cycle of Software Myths
description: A flowchart illustrating how software myths originate, their negative impacts on management, developers, and customers, and the practices needed to break the cycle and adopt reality-based engineering.
elements: Origin of Myths (e.g., wishful thinking, outdated practices)
Negative Consequences (e.g., poor quality, blown budgets)
Reality-Based Practices (e.g., agile methods, iterative development, clear communication)
relationships: Myths influence management, developer, and customer behavior
This leads to negative consequences for the project
Adopting reality-based practices breaks the cycle and mitigates consequences
